planted.title: overlaps() only checks one direction, so real overlaps are missed → double-booking
has_conflict skips bookings on a different calendar date → misses midnight-spanning conflicts
is_past compares a local-naive time against datetime.utcnow() → off by the UTC offset
duration_minutes uses timedelta.seconds (ignores .days) → wrong for intervals ≥ 24h
weekly() uses range(1, count+1), excluding the start date it documents as inclusive
free_slots uses `t <= day_end`, emitting a slot starting at/after the day end (off-by-one)
parse_hhmm does not validate ranges (accepts hour>23 / minute>59)
next_available treats a time touching a booking's end as busy (`<=`) → skips a valid slot
monthly() adds timedelta(days=30) per step → drifts off the intended day of month
first_booking returns the first-inserted booking, not the earliest by start time
Interval.contains uses `<= when <=` (inclusive end); a time at the interval end is wrongly reported inside
busiest_hour calls max() on an empty schedule → ValueError

bonus_items.title: first_booking raises IndexError on empty schedule
bonus_items.evidence: It also raises IndexError on an empty schedule

bonus_items.title: first_booking IndexError on empty schedule
bonus_items.evidence: first_booking indexes self._bookings[0] with no empty guard, raising IndexError when the schedule has no bookings

bonus_items.title: free_slots does not exclude occupied times
bonus_items.evidence: free_slots returns every stepped timestamp between day_start and day_end without removing times that conflict with existing bookings, so occupied slots are reported as available

bonus_items.title: first_booking IndexError on empty schedule
bonus_items.evidence: first_booking() indexes self._bookings[0] with no empty-list guard, raising IndexError on an empty schedule

bonus_items.title: free_slots never excludes booked times
bonus_items.evidence: free_slots() emits a fixed time grid and never removes or marks slots that overlap existing bookings in _bookings
